HomePage.title: Three Queen Villa and Homestay
HomePage.subtitle: An authentic stay experience in West Sumba — where tradition meets modern comfort.
HomePage.heroDesc: An authentic stay experience in West Sumba — where tradition meets modern comfort.
HomePage.highlightBody: Three Queen Villa offers a stay that blends traditional Sumba architecture with modern amenities. Each room is designed for maximum comfort, surrounded by the stunning landscapes of West Sumba. Enjoy tranquility, local hospitality, and cultural adventure all in one place.
